request_payload.ai_prompt_hint: Treat this as a checklist: list triggered flags first, then explain each using flag_value vs threshold, severity, flag_description, and recommended_action. Keep non-triggered flags brief.
request_payload.actionable_question: What specific risk signals are active for me right now?

risk_flags.flag_description: Average score is below the pass threshold for this dataset scale.
risk_flags.recommended_action: Review the weakest assessment topics and schedule tutor support before the next assessment.

risk_flags.flag_description: This student has previous attempts, which can indicate accumulated difficulty or re-enrolment risk.
risk_flags.recommended_action: Check prior attempt context and confirm whether the student needs a catch-up plan.

risk_flags.flag_description: Engagement score is above the safety threshold.
risk_flags.recommended_action: Maintain a consistent weekly study routine and keep using course resources.

risk_flags.flag_description: Submission punctuality is below the expected threshold.
risk_flags.recommended_action: Use deadline reminders and submit drafts earlier to reduce late-submission risk.

risk_flags.flag_description: Scores are trending downward across assessments.
risk_flags.recommended_action: Compare recent feedback with earlier stronger work and intervene before the next assessment.

confidence.reason: 1998 students × 9 assessments across 8 weeks — strong statistical basis.

explanation.summary: You have a few important risk signals that indicate areas where you can improve your academic performance. Addressing these can help you get back on track and succeed in your studies.

insights.title: Repeated Attempts
insights.description: You have previously attempted this course, which may suggest you are facing some challenges. It's important to understand the context of these attempts to provide the right support.

evidence.context: Previous attempts indicate potential difficulties.; original_comparison=triggered

insights.title: Low Punctuality
insights.description: Your submission punctuality is below the expected threshold, which can impact your overall performance. Setting reminders and submitting drafts earlier can help you improve in this area.

evidence.context: Punctuality is crucial for maintaining good grades.; original_comparison=triggered

insights.title: Negative Trend in Scores
insights.description: Your scores are trending downward, which is a concern. It's essential to review recent feedback and compare it with your earlier work to identify areas for improvement.

evidence.context: A downward trend can indicate a need for intervention.; original_comparison=triggered

educational_implications: Addressing these risk signals can help you improve your academic performance and reduce the likelihood of further challenges.

recommendations.action: Check prior attempt context and confirm whether you need a catch-up plan.
recommendations.rationale: Understanding your previous attempts can help tailor support to your needs.

recommendations.action: Use deadline reminders and submit drafts earlier.
recommendations.rationale: Improving punctuality can enhance your overall performance and reduce stress.

recommendations.action: Compare recent feedback with earlier stronger work and intervene before the next assessment.
recommendations.rationale: Identifying areas of decline can help you focus your efforts effectively.

confidence.reason: The data is clear and indicates specific areas of concern.

raw_text:
Summary: You have a few important risk signals that indicate areas where you can improve your academic performance. Addressing these can help you get back on track and succeed in your studies.

Insights: Repeated Attempts: You have previously attempted this course, which may suggest you are facing some challenges. It's important to understand the context of these attempts to provide the right support. | Low Punctuality: Your submission punctuality is below the expected threshold, which can impact your overall performance. Setting reminders and submitting drafts earlier can help you improve in this area. | Negative Trend in Scores: Your scores are trending downward, which is a concern. It's essential to review recent feedback and compare it with your earlier work to identify areas for improvement.

Educational implications: Addressing these risk signals can help you improve your academic performance and reduce the likelihood of further challenges.

Recommendations: high - Check prior attempt context and confirm whether you need a catch-up plan. - Understanding your previous attempts can help tailor support to your needs. | high - Use deadline reminders and submit drafts earlier. - Improving punctuality can enhance your overall performance and reduce stress. | high - Compare recent feedback with earlier stronger work and intervene before the next assessment. - Identifying areas of decline can help you focus your efforts effectively.
